arts.ttl: How to watch RB Leipzig v Aston Villa, TV channel and live stream
arts.sum: The game has been selected for live coverage by Amazon Prime Video, who have had access to selected Champions League matches this season once again. Aston Villa continue their European tour on Tuesday evening when they make for Germany to take on RB Leipzig in the fifth gameweek of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs Aston Villa preview: Emery relishing chance close in on knockout phase
arts.sum: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery is relishing the opportunity to take his side one step closer to Champions League knockout qualification at RB Leipzig in an important game for both teams. A loss at Club Brugge and a draw at home to Juventus means Villa have failed to win either of their last two European games after starting the competition with three straight victories.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs. Aston Villa: Unai Emery out to avoid ending nine-year Champions League run
arts.sum: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery will be looking to avoid ending a nine-year streak when his side face RB Leipzig in the Champions League on Tuesday evening.

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker makes rare Chelsea FFP suggestion amid Aston Villa fury
arts.sum: Owner Todd Boehly has sanctioned deals which have abided by the much debated financial rules by offering extensive contracts to players in order to spread the cost of their signings over a number of years, in order to remain within the limitations of any given three-year cycle; Fernandez, Caicedo, Mudryk, Nicolas Jackson all have contracts for another seven years. Chelsea have spent hundreds of millions of pounds - and nine figure sums on individual players, no less, in the case of Enzo Fernandez and Moises Caicedo, while the cost of Mykhailo Mudryk could rise to those sorts of numbers in the years to come - in recent years and have also chopped and changed their managers at will, too.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs Aston Villa Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: RB Leipzig continue their quest for a first victory in the Champions League this season when they host Aston Villa on Tuesday evening. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score prediction, pro...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa loanee tipped for 'realistic' transfer route out of club by former boss
arts.sum: Former Preston manager Alex Neil, who was in charge of the club between 2017 and 2021, has stated that he believes Kesler-Hayden would be a realistic acquisition for North End after his loan deal expires. Speaking to BBC Radio Lancashire, Neil said regarding the Villa academy product and on loan teammate Sam Greenwood: "We are not talking about guys who are expected to go back to their respective clubs and break in.

arts.ttl: I got stopped to discuss Aston Villa at 35,000 feet in surreal journey to Leipzig
arts.sum: Captain Phillips (not Tom Hanks) took some 30 Villa fans over from Birmingham to Berlin earlier on Sunday and enjoyed some craic with them, before flying me over to the German capital in the afternoon. After taking a couple of snaps with Captain Phillips, I then met another big Villa fan, Jonathan Collett, inside the train station.

arts.ttl: 'I would like that': £25m Champions League star suggests Aston Villa or Newcastle move would appeal
arts.sum: He's keen on a switch to England...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa co-owner Wes Edens strikes £351m mega deal in the UK
arts.sum: Aston Villa co-owner Wes Edens' company Fortress Investment Group has completed the acquisition of UK pub and restaurant company Loungers, which owns chains like Lounge and Cosy Club, for more than £350m. Billionaire Edens ' Fortress have also previously acquired Majestic Wine, Punch Pubs and Vagabond, as well as cinema chain Curzon for around $5m.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa have been set €45m transfer fee with club 'willing to listen to offers'
arts.sum: With the January transfer window looming, Aston Villa have been linked with talented midfielder Felix Nmecha who was a figure in Borussia Dortmund's journey to last season's Champions League final. The Villans are amongst a host of Premier League clubs said to be interested in the BVB player who has begun to impress in Germany since moving to the Signal Iduna Park in the summer of 2023 from fellow Bundesliga side Wolfsburg.
